items.title: Blocked toilets, sewage, clogged pipelines, homesick, depressed, and angry personnel aboard: Whats happening on USS Gerald R. Ford?
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Guthrie suspect believed to have visited home before she went missing
items.dek: A masked man in doorbell camera footage is thought to have visited Guthrie's home before the night she disappeared.
items.body: A masked man in doorbell camera footage is thought to have visited Guthrie's home before the night she disappeared.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Hong Kong lodges 'strong protest' after Panama takes control of canal ports
items.dek: Last month, Panama's Supreme Court cancelled the contracts of a Hong Kong based firm that allowed it to operate the ports.
items.body: Last month, Panama's Supreme Court cancelled the contracts of a Hong Kong based firm that allowed it to operate the ports.
items.author: IriLine Desk
